key.name: allowed-controls
key.summary: v4l2 control names the extension is allowed to expose
key.description: Names of v4l2 controls that, when found on an active camera's v4l2 subdev or video node, will be rendered as sliders in the panel menu. Only writable, non-read-only controls that appear in this list will be shown. Names must match the v4l2 control-name shape ([a-z][a-z0-9_]*).
